heading: Regional liaisons for minority, tribal, and low-income communities
label: 4370i Regional liaisons for minority, tribal, and low-income communities
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the America’s Water Infrastructure Act of 2018, and not as part of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency (referred to in this section as the “Administrator”) shall assign at least one employee in each regional office of the Environmental Protection Agency to serve as a liaison to minority, Tribal, and low-income communities in the relevant region.
the relevant regional office of the Environmental Protection Agency; and
the Office of Environmental Justice of the Environmental Protection Agency.
